pages.title: Anchit Tandon — D2C Product Leader & AI Builder
pages.description: Anchit Tandon — AGM, Product Management & D2C Growth at Vahdam India. Backend engineer turned PM building growth funnels, retention systems & AI tools.

og.title: Anchit Tandon — D2C Product Leader & AI Builder
og.description: AGM, Product Management & D2C Growth at Vahdam India. Backend engineer turned PM building growth funnels, retention systems and AI side builds.

twitter.title: Anchit Tandon — D2C Product Leader & AI Builder
twitter.description: AGM, Product Management & D2C Growth at Vahdam India. Building growth funnels, retention systems and AI tools.

faq.a: Anchit Tandon is a product leader and AI builder based in India. He is AGM, Product Management, D2C Growth at Vahdam India, and a backend engineer turned product manager who focuses on growth funnels, subscriptions, 0-to-1 consumer products, and AI workflows. He previously worked at Times Internet and studied Computer Science & Engineering at Vellore Institute of Technology.

faq.q: What does Anchit Tandon do at Vahdam India?
faq.a: As AGM, Product Management & D2C Growth at Vahdam India, Anchit drives direct-to-consumer growth across US, UK and global markets. He is building a customer lifecycle and retention operating system, optimising funnels, and improving subscription and marketing revenue, operating at the intersection of product, growth and revenue.

Anchit has built AI-powered side products including D2C-LifeCycle-OS (a retention and lifecycle marketing engine), Mailer Studio (AI HTML email generation), The Third Eye AI video avatar, an all-in-one landing page agent, a How-To Engine, Hey Yaara, MusicGenAI, AI TeleSuite and LifeEngine. At Times Internet he scaled Assisted Sales 5x to Rs 80L MRR and grew ET Markets to Rs 3Cr+ incremental ARR.

faq.q: Where did Anchit Tandon work before Vahdam India?
faq.a: Before Vahdam India, Anchit was a Product Manager and then Senior Product Manager at Times Internet, where he led the 0-to-1 launch of the Times Internet Delhi Half Marathon 2026 (15,000+ participants), scaled Assisted Sales 5x, revamped ET Markets, and built an AI telesuite. He started his career as a backend software engineer.

faq.q: How do I contact Anchit Tandon?
faq.a: You can reach Anchit through the contact section of anchit-tandon.com, by email at anchit.tandon@gmail.com, or via LinkedIn at linkedin.com/in/anchit-tandon. He is open to product and growth roles as well as collaborations.

D2C-LifeCycle-OS is a brand-agnostic customer lifecycle and retention operating system Anchit built. You enter a D2C brand URL and it designs customer segments, email flows and a campaign calendar, benchmarks the category, and generates HTML mailers, powered by a multi-provider LLM cascade with a deterministic fallback.

pages.title: AI Video Avatar of Anchit Tandon — Talk on Camera
pages.description: A photoreal AI video avatar of Anchit Tandon. Ask anything and he answers on camera, in his own cloned voice — powered by D-ID and a TTS cascade.
keywords: AI avatar cloned voice on camera

og.title: AI Video Avatar of Anchit Tandon — Talk on Camera
og.description: A photoreal AI video avatar of Anchit Tandon. Ask anything and he answers on camera, in his own cloned voice.

twitter.title: AI Video Avatar of Anchit Tandon — Talk on Camera
twitter.description: A photoreal AI video avatar that answers on camera in Anchit Tandon's own cloned voice. Ask anything.

faq.q: What is the Talk to Anchit AI video avatar?
faq.a: It is a photoreal AI video avatar of Anchit Tandon. You type or speak a question and a lifelike on-camera avatar answers in his own cloned voice, drawing on his product management and D2C growth experience.

faq.q: How does the AI video avatar work?
faq.a: Your question is answered by a Claude-backed chat brain, then the reply is rendered as a talking-head video through a D-ID pipeline while the words are spoken by a text-to-speech cascade. If video rendering is unavailable it falls back to voice only, and finally to the device's speech synthesis.

faq.q: How is the avatar's voice cloned?
faq.a: The site's own TTS cascade generates the speech, and when an ElevenLabs voice is connected in D-ID the avatar speaks in Anchit's cloned voice rather than a generic one.

faq.q: Can I ask the avatar anything?
faq.a: Yes. It is tuned to answer questions about Anchit's work at Vahdam India, his D2C growth playbook, his lifecycle marketing approach and his AI side projects. You can type or tap the mic to ask by voice.

faq.q: Is the AI video avatar free to use?
faq.a: Yes, it is a free interactive experiment on Anchit Tandon's portfolio site — no signup or API key required.

jsonld.name: Talk to Anchit — AI Video Avatar
jsonld.browserRequirements: Requires JavaScript. Runs in any modern browser.
jsonld.description: A photoreal AI video avatar of Anchit Tandon. Type or speak a question and a lifelike avatar answers on camera in his own cloned voice, backed by a Claude-powered chat brain, a D-ID video pipeline and a text-to-speech cascade with graceful voice-only fallback.

pages.title: D2C-LifeCycle-OS — AI Lifecycle Marketing | Anchit Tandon
pages.description: Plug-and-play, brand-agnostic AI lifecycle marketing OS. Enter any D2C brand and get benchmarks, segments, a campaign calendar, mailers, retention flows & KPIs.
keywords: AI retention platform for D2C brands

og.title: D2C-LifeCycle-OS — AI-led lifecycle marketing for any brand
og.description: Plug-and-play lifecycle marketing OS. Enter a brand, get segments, a campaign calendar, mailers, retention flows and KPIs — AI-generated.

twitter.title: D2C-LifeCycle-OS — AI Lifecycle Marketing for Any Brand
twitter.description: Enter a D2C brand and get benchmarks, segments, a campaign calendar, mailers, retention flows and KPIs — AI-generated.

faq.a: D2C-LifeCycle-OS is a plug-and-play, brand-agnostic AI lifecycle marketing operating system built by Anchit Tandon. You enter a D2C brand and it designs the whole retention funnel — audience segments, a campaign calendar, sample mailers, retention flows and KPIs — all AI-generated.

Type a brand name and optional website into the live demo and press Generate plan. The engine benchmarks the category, builds segments and lifecycle stages, drafts a week-by-week calendar and an on-brand mailer, wires retention automations and sets target KPIs. You can export the full plan as JSON.

faq.q: Is D2C-LifeCycle-OS specific to one brand?
faq.a: No — it is subject-agnostic. It ships loaded with anchit-tandon.com as a demo (marketing a résumé like a D2C product), but you can point it at any consumer brand and the same engine adapts positioning, audiences, calendar and voice.

faq.q: How does the AI benchmark a brand's industry?
faq.a: It reads the subject's category and comparable set and starts every plan from real baseline response-rate and retention bands — the way SimilarWeb or SEMrush profile a market — rather than guessing, then generates the segments and flows on top of those benchmarks.

faq.q: What does the generated lifecycle plan include?
faq.a: Each plan includes an industry read and benchmarks, a data-analysis view (segmentation model, best send window, cohort retention, cross-sell affinity), audience segments, lifecycle stages, a campaign calendar, a strategy-locked on-brand mailer with scored variants, retention automations, a Smart Brain autopilot loop, guardrails and target KPIs.
Yes — it is a free live demo on Anchit Tandon's portfolio site. No signup is required to generate a plan or export it as JSON.

jsonld.name: D2C-LifeCycle-OS
jsonld.browserRequirements: Requires JavaScript. Runs in any modern browser.
jsonld.description: A plug-and-play, brand-agnostic AI lifecycle marketing operating system for D2C brands. Enter a brand or URL and it benchmarks the category (SimilarWeb / SEMrush-style), then generates a full lifecycle plan: audience segments, lifecycle stages, a week-by-week campaign calendar, an on-brand sample mailer with scored variants, retention automations, a Smart Brain autopilot loop, guardrails and target KPIs. Exports the plan as JSON.
featureList: Industry benchmarking for any D2C category
AI-generated audience segments and RFM cohorts
On-brand sample mailer with scored variants (Mailer Studio)

llmsTxt:
# Anchit Tandon

> Anchit Tandon is a D2C product leader and AI builder. He is AGM, Product Management & D2C Growth at Vahdam India, a backend engineer turned product manager focused on growth funnels, subscriptions, 0-to-1 consumer products, retention systems and AI workflows. Previously Product Manager / Senior PM at Times Internet. This site is an interactive OS-style portfolio plus a suite of live AI tools he built.

## Core

- [Home / Portfolio](https://anchit-tandon.com/): Who Anchit is, his work at Vahdam India, career at Times Internet, and links to every AI side build.
- [AI Video Avatar — Talk to Anchit](https://anchit-tandon.com/agent): A photoreal AI video avatar that answers on camera in his cloned voice (Claude brain + D-ID + TTS cascade).
- [D2C-LifeCycle-OS](https://anchit-tandon.com/d2c-lifecycle-os): Plug-and-play, brand-agnostic AI lifecycle marketing OS — enter a D2C brand and get benchmarks, segments, a campaign calendar, mailers, retention flows and KPIs.
- [JobHunt](https://anchit-tandon.com/jobhunt): A free live AI job-search agent — pulls real openings from public boards with direct apply links and AI-tailored resumes.
- [The How-To Engine](https://anchit-tandon.com/how-to-2): An ADHD-friendly, 3D interactive learning engine that explains any humanly-doable task via a multi-model agentic cascade.

## Lifecycle OS suite

- [Lifecycle OS](https://anchit-tandon.com/lifecycle-os): The umbrella AI-led D2C growth operating system tying the modules below into one loop.
- [Data Analysis](https://anchit-tandon.com/lifecycle-os-analysis): D2C growth analytics workbench — KPIs, signals board, cohort retention, breakdowns, CSV export.
- [Marketing Calendar](https://anchit-tandon.com/lifecycle-os-calendar): 90-day, segment- and festival-aware campaign calendar with a per-slot mailer pipeline.
- [Mailer Studio](https://anchit-tandon.com/lifecycle-os-studio): Turn a brief into on-brand, quality-scored, ready-to-send HTML email variants.
- [Competitive Intelligence](https://anchit-tandon.com/lifecycle-os-intel): SimilarWeb / SEMrush-style peer profiling and benchmark bands.
- [Smart Brain](https://anchit-tandon.com/lifecycle-os-brain): Agentic 90-day planning, cohort orchestration and full-funnel content with a verify/approve loop.
- [Retention Playbook](https://anchit-tandon.com/lifecycle-os-playbook): Library of lifecycle plays — triggers, flows and KPIs by category.
- [Landing Page Studio](https://anchit-tandon.com/lifecycle-os-landing): Generate a conversion-shaped landing page from a brief, with live preview and downloadable HTML.
- [Cohort Builder](https://anchit-tandon.com/lifecycle-os-cohorts): Behavioural cohort definitions with rules, sizes and the recommended play.
- [Ads Studio](https://anchit-tandon.com/lifecycle-os-ads): Ad-copy matrix (headlines × primary text × CTAs) across platforms with benchmark targets.
- [Social Studio](https://anchit-tandon.com/lifecycle-os-social): On-brand per-platform social posts (caption + hashtags).
- [Creative Gallery](https://anchit-tandon.com/lifecycle-os-creative): On-brand creative concepts (ad, banner, social tile, email hero).
- [Growth Audit](https://anchit-tandon.com/lifecycle-os-audit): Lifecycle / funnel audit with prioritised findings and concrete fixes.
- [Frameworks](https://anchit-tandon.com/lifecycle-os-frameworks): AARRR, RFM, JTBD, Hook and Bullseye applied concretely to a subject.
- [Sonic Branding](https://anchit-tandon.com/lifecycle-os-music): Generate a short brand melody plus a sonic-identity brief.
- [Ask the Brand Brain](https://anchit-tandon.com/lifecycle-os-ask): Q&A answering lifecycle and growth questions from generated brand facts.
- [Connectors](https://anchit-tandon.com/lifecycle-os-connectors): Where a store, ESP and analytics would plug in; runs on benchmarks until connected.

## Contact

- Email: anchit.tandon@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/anchit-tandon
notes: OG/Twitter images point to /AnchitTandon-AppLogo.png, which is a ~1.5 MB square app logo, not a social-share image. Create a dedicated 1200x630 PNG (e.g. /og-image.png) and repoint every og:image and twitter:image to it for correct link-preview rendering. Compress it well under 1 MB.

Person JSON-LD exposes a personal email (anchit.tandon@gmail.com) and telephone (+91-98739-45238) on every reference — confirm Anchit is comfortable publishing the phone number in structured data before shipping; drop the telephone field if not.

The full Person + Organization + WebSite JSON-LD objects are emitted ONLY on the homepage (index.html). Every other page references them by @id (https://anchit-tandon.com/#person and /#website), so the homepage must always be crawlable for those @id references to resolve.

Route /how-to-2 is served from source file side-husle/how-to-1/index.html via the vercel.json rewrite, and /how-to, /how-to-1 redirect to /how-to-2 (currently permanent:false / 307). Consider making those redirects permanent (301) once the /how-to-2 URL is final, so link equity consolidates.
sitemap.xml lastmod is set to 2026-07-24 for all URLs; regenerate lastmod per-file from real git commit dates on future deploys for accuracy.

robots.txt disallows /api/ (serverless functions) and explicitly allows major AI/answer-engine crawlers (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended, etc.) for AEO. Confirm this matches Anchit's preference on AI training/answer usage.

index-motion.html exists in the repo but is not in the 22-file scope and has no route/canonical here; ensure it is not deployed to a crawlable URL or add a canonical/ noindex to avoid duplicate-content with /.

Verify all canonicals resolve without trailing slash except the homepage (vercel.json has trailingSlash:false + cleanUrls:true) — canonicals here use extensionless paths (e.g. /lifecycle-os-studio) to match.

Only three pages ship FAQPage schema (/, /agent, /d2c-lifecycle-os) because only those had source FAQ content. Add FAQ blocks + FAQPage to high-intent tool pages (jobhunt, how-to-2, lifecycle-os) later to capture more AEO surface.
